strategy.name: BTC_XAU_TrendReversion_Fixed
strategy.rationale: Corrected mean-reversion: price must be BELOW SMA for longs, RSI oversold, low ATR, with 200-SMA trend alignment. Wider 2.4R ratio survives spread at modest WR.

history.analysis: All 3 trades stopped out immediately; mean-reversion entries in trending/volatile conditions. SMA-above-price long logic contradictory (buying above SMA during dip). ATR filter too loose at 0.3%. TP/SL ratio 1.9:1 insufficient after spread drag.
mistakes: Contradictory long condition: requires price_vs_sma op '>' (price above SMA) while seeking oversold dip - these conflict, producing bad entries
0.2% stop is too tight for 5m BTC/XAU noise; all 3 trades stopped on normal wick before any reversion could occur
ATR filter <0.3% passed during genuinely volatile candles - threshold needs tightening to <0.15% to avoid choppy entries
No trend alignment filter - entering mean-reversion longs into downtrends; need confirmation that broader trend supports direction
changes: Fix price_vs_sma logic: longs require price BELOW SMA (true reversion), shorts require price ABOVE SMA
Widen stop to 0.35% and TP to 0.85% for 2.4R minimum, giving edge even at 40% WR
Tighten ATR filter to <0.15% to avoid high-volatility traps
Add SMA trend filter on longer period to confirm directional bias before entry

strategy.name: BTC_XAU_TrendReversion_Fixed
strategy.rationale: Corrected mean-reversion: price must be BELOW SMA for longs, RSI oversold, low ATR, with 200-SMA trend alignment. Wider 2.4R ratio survives spread at modest WR.

history.analysis: Pairs cheap-spread assets trading RSI extremes vs SMA: oversold pullbacks to SMA on low ATR for controlled reversion. ETH excluded due to 8x spread penalty; diversifies across uncorrelated assets.
changes: Tournament of 3: XAU_MeanReversion_Bollinger (5m) net $-15.19 in 4 trades | BTC_Momentum_Breakout (5m) net $-5.94 in 8 trades | BTC_XAU_DualAsset_SMAReversion (5m) net $-2.19 in 2 trades <- DEPLOYED
